bead.title: cost: charge reviewer cost to cap; review-cost-deferred policy
bead.description: Today reviewer cost is silently undercounted (the review path doesn't accumulate CostUSD into --max-cost). CostUSD is ALREADY reported by Fizeau on Final events for every call (no upstream change needed — it's been there). Fix: charge reviewer cost to --max-cost on the same accumulator the implementer uses. Policy: when implementer fits but implementer+reviewer would exceed, defer review (emit 'review-cost-deferred' event) rather than silently skip.
bead.acceptance: 1. --max-cost includes reviewer cost in the accumulator. 2. review-cost-deferred event when budget would be exceeded by review. 3. Tests cover the deferral case + the normal fit case.
